title: Calibrate Your Expectations
description: Track how long each task takes to see how well your expectations match reality.

title: See Just What Matters Most
description: Filter tasks using any (or every!) detail that's tracked — whether that's the due date, a custom tag, the time you've spent working on it, or anything else.

title: Intelligently Organize Your Tasks
description: Let Tasktix intelligently order your day based on tasks' due date and priority or take extra control by ordering your tasks in the exact order you want to complete them.

title: Collaborate With Granular Permissions
description: Use role-based access control to efficiently manage each team member's permissions.

title: Self-Host
description: Tasktix will always be open source and self-hostable so you can confidently maintain control over your data.
